# Pre-PR Template (fill in before opening PR)

Branch: [BRANCH-NAME]

## PR Title

A short, descriptive title for the pull request.

## PR Description

Provide a concise description of the change, why it was made, and any important implementation notes.

## Linked issues

- Closes: #
- Fixes: #
- Touches: #

## LLM Review Summary

(Agent-generated) A short summary of what the LLM checked for, design decisions it used from `README_LLM.md`, and any potential risks.

## Manual validation & test steps

1. Steps to reproduce and verify the change locally.
2. Commands to run (build/tests/lint).
3. Any environment variables or services required (e.g., local Supabase).

## Checklist

- [ ] Code compiles
- [ ] Unit tests pass
- [ ] Integration tests (if applicable) pass
- [ ] No secrets committed
- [ ] RLS/security considerations reviewed

## Notes / Follow-ups

Any follow-up tasks or TODOs that should happen after merge.
